about: Per-page SEO copy for game+category pages, applied by:
Keys: game + category are the URL slugs (display-slug renames like
free-fire/diamonds resolve automatically). Only the fields present in an
entry are written, so a page can set just a title. seo_title is rendered
WITHOUT the '| GamesBazaar' suffix (the site adds it) - aim ~50 chars.
seo_description: aim 140-160 chars. seo_body: blank line = new paragraph,
Payment wording rule: never JazzCash-only - say 'JazzCash, Easypaisa or
bank transfer' or 'Pakistani payment methods', varied per page.
Copy voice rule: write for a MULTI-SELLER marketplace - never hardcode
one seller's delivery mechanic; mechanics live on listings.
Batch 1 (2026-07-17): highest-search Pakistani pages - mobile top-ups,
Batch 2 (2026-07-17): keys + accounts pages for the 10 biggest PC
